name: Sparket
notes: Reviewed overlay for SN57 using the official Sparket website and source repository. No official docs/API/OpenAPI surface is verified yet.

gap_notes: No verified official docs URL yet.
No verified safe public subnet API endpoint yet.
No verified standalone static data artifact yet.

surfaces.name: Sparket API health
surfaces.notes: Public no-auth GET returning the Sparket (SN57) backend API health as JSON (status, db connectivity, version, and sync lag). Served on the subnet's own registered website domain sparket.ai under /api/v1/. Fills the file's noted missing public-API-endpoint gap.

surfaces.name: Sparket miner leaderboard
surfaces.notes: Public no-auth GET returning the Sparket (SN57) miner leaderboard as JSON — per-miner rank, uid, component scores (skill/accuracy/edge/timeliness/uniqueness), incentive, and weight (25 ranked rows plus a meta block). Served on the subnet's own registered domain sparket.ai under /api/v1/; all fields are public scoreboard and ranking data. Fills the file's noted missing standalone-data-artifact gap.

surfaces.name: Sparket miner leaderboard dashboard
surfaces.notes: Public no-auth web leaderboard for SN57 Sparket at dashboard.sparket.ai/leaderboard — the Sparket prediction-markets app's live miner leaderboard view, rendering the same rankings exposed by the subnet's public /api/v1/leaderboard endpoint. Served on the official sparket.ai domain (app subdomain); distinct host from the sparket.ai API surfaces.
